title: Derived Entity
text: Derived Entity A Derived Entity is a Development Object that references and inherits from a Modeled Entity. It can be a subobject of a Modeled Entity (in which case it is known as a Subtype Entity), or of a Component or Modeled Component. Characteristics Characteristic Icon: Object type code: ent Main Development Object? No Part of: Modeled Entity , Component , Modeled Component Contains: Field , Key , Relationship , Property , Code Container Generalization: Entity Specializations: Subtype Entity , Derived Component Entity Compilation Output: — URI format: ent: SupertypeEntityName /ent: SubtypeEntityName cpt: ComponentName /ent: EntityName Specialization Derived Entity specializes Entity in the following ways: It inherits from a Modeled Entity. It has a Modeled Entity, Component, or Modeled Component as parent object. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
